articles.title_en: Netflix invented binge-watching. Now it may have outgrown it.
articles.title_ru: Netflix invented binge-watching. Now it may have outgrown it.
articles.preview_en: A new report suggests Netflix viewers aren’t sticking around for Season 2.

articles.full_en: A new report suggests Netflix viewers aren’t sticking around for Season 2. The bigger issue may be that binge-watching itself is no longer the advantage it once was.

articles.title_en: Emmanuel Macron visits Syria, 18 months after Assad's fall
articles.title_ru: Emmanuel Macron visits Syria, 18 months after Assad's fall
articles.preview_en: The French president landed in Damascus on Monday evening.
articles.preview_ru: The French president landed in Damascus on Monday evening.
articles.full_en: The French president landed in Damascus on Monday evening. He's the first EU leader to visit the country since Bashar Assad's sudden downfall and the rise of former militant turned President Ahmed al-Sharaa.

articles.title_en: What a divorce coach wishes couples knew before ending a marriage

articles.preview_en: Divorce is a tool, not a weapon, says Karen McNenny, author of a new book on the subject.

articles.full_en: Divorce is a tool, not a weapon, says Karen McNenny, author of a new book on the subject. She explains how to end a marriage while protecting your family and your mental health.
